action_set_definitions.name: get_vehicle_system_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves high-level status of the vehicle including scanner connection, ignition position, and battery voltage.

action_set_definitions.name: scan_diagnostic_trouble_codes
action_set_definitions.description: Reads all active, pending, and historical DTCs from the Engine Control Unit.

action_set_definitions.name: read_sensor_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time sensor readings for specific systems to isolate primary failures from noise.

action_set_definitions.name: inspect_hardware_component
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a detailed health check and physical state verification of a specific mechanical or electrical component.

component_id.description: The ID or name of the component (e.g., 'def_injector', 'scr_catalyst', 'nox_sensor_2').

example_output.notes: Crystallized urea buildup detected at nozzle.

action_set_definitions.name: set_vehicle_state
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies the physical state of the vehicle, such as ignition position or connecting tools.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_hardware_intervention
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a physical repair, replacement, or cleaning of a identified faulty component.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_system_verification_test
action_set_definitions.description: Runs automated service routines like SCR efficiency tests or DPF regenerations to verify the fix.

action_set_definitions.name: clear_inducements_and_codes
action_set_definitions.description: Clears all diagnostic trouble codes and resets the derate/inducement timers once the root cause is resolved.

state_description.battery_voltage: Current voltage of the vehicle battery in Volts.
state_description.obd_fault_codes: A list of active and pending Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DTCs) stored in the Engine Control Unit.
state_description.component_health: A mapping of mechanical/electronic parts to their health status (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.ignition_position: The current position of the ignition switch: 'OFF', 'ACC', 'ON', or 'START'.
state_description.engine_running: Whether the engine is currently idling or running.
state_description.fuel_pressure_psi: The current pressure in the fuel rail measured in PSI.
state_description.is_obd_scanner_connected: Status of the physical connection between the OBD-II scanner and the vehicle port.
